summary: Comprehensive testing of PFM Transfer Import functionality - All features working correctly. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All tabs (Protection incendie, RCCI, Remise de propriété, Détails DSI) display imported data correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test interventions via POST /api/demo/import/batch with TEST- prefix (TEST-IMPORT-*, TEST-INTENT-*, TEST-NATUR-*, TEST-INDET-*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PFM Transfer Import functionality is fully working. Test interventions with TEST- prefix exist in the database and can be used for regression testing. The import/batch endpoint creates interventions with properly mapped fields for Protection incendie (smoke_detector_presence, smoke_detector_functional, sprinkler_present), RCCI (probable_cause normalized to accidentelle/intentionnelle/naturelle/indeterminee, ignition_source normalized to cuisson/electrique/foudre/etc), and Remise de propriété (auto-created with PDF generation on-the-fly).

POST /api/demo/import/batch.details: Successfully imports PremLigne interventions with complete data (cause incendie, protection, remise, véhicules, personnel)

GET /api/demo/interventions/{id}/rcci.details: Lazy RCCI creation works. Normalized values: Accidentelle→accidentelle, Intentionnelle→intentionnelle, Naturelle→naturelle, Indéterminée→indeterminee. Ignition source: Cuisinière→cuisson, Foudre→foudre

GET /api/demo/interventions/detail/{id}.details: Protection fields correctly mapped: id_avert_fonctionne=11 → smoke_detector_presence=yes, smoke_detector_functional=worked. id_extinction_fonctionne=88 → sprinkler_present=false

GET /api/demo/interventions/{id}/remises.details: Remise de propriété auto-created from import data with remis_a and date_libere fields

GET /api/demo/interventions/{id}/remise-.details: PDF generated on-the-fly (HTTP 200), no more 404 errors

POST /api/demo/import/fix-existing-inter.details: Re-extraction endpoint works for existing interventions

Frontend Protection incendie tab.details: Shows Avertisseur de fumée (Présence: Oui, Fonctionnement: A fonctionné) and Système de gicleurs (Présence: Non)

Frontend RCCI (Enquête) tab.details: Shows Cause probable: Accidentelle, Point d'origine: Cuisine, Source de chaleur: Équipement de cuisson, Premier matériau: Graisse

Frontend Remise de propriété tab.details: Shows remise entry with OK status and PDF download button working
